mapper.sql: r.id, r.name, r.type, r.region, r.city_id, c.name AS city_name, r.category_id, cat.name AS category_name, r.config_id, r.period, r.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM rank_item count_item WHERE count_item.rank_id = r.id) AS item_count, (SELECT s.cover_url FROM rank_item cover_item JOIN shop s ON s.id = cover_item.shop_id WHERE cover_item.rank_id = r.id ORDER BY cover_item.position ASC LIMIT 1) AS cover_url, (SELECT s.name FROM rank_item top_item JOIN shop s ON s.id = top_item.shop_id WHERE top_item.rank_id = r.id ORDER BY top_item.position ASC LIMIT 1) AS top_shop_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `rank` r LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id = r.city_id LEFT JOIN category cat ON cat.id = r.category_id WHERE r.id = #{rankId} AND r.region = #{region} AND r.enabled = TRUE

SELECT ri.position, ri.score AS rank_score, ri.reason, s.id AS shop_id, s.name AS shop_name, s.cover_url, s.score, s.price_per_capita, s.currency, s.address, c.name AS city_name, a.name AS area_name, s.has_deal, s.open_now, s.tags FROM rank_item ri JOIN `rank` r ON r.id = ri.rank_id JOIN shop s ON s.id = ri.shop_id AND s.region = r.region AND s.is_deleted = FALSE LEFT JOIN city c ON c.id = s.city_id LEFT JOIN area a ON a.id = s.area_id WHERE ri.rank_id = #{rankId} AND r.region = #{region} AND r.enabled = TRUE ORDER BY ri.position ASC, ri.id ASC

SELECT id, rank_type, region, city_id, category_id, version, calc_cycle, weight_json, min_review_count, min_score, manual_intervene, status, effective_from, effective_to, updated_by, updated_at FROM rank_config WHERE region = #{region} ORDER BY rank_type ASC, city_id ASC, category_id ASC, version DESC

SELECT id, rank_type, region, city_id, category_id, version, calc_cycle, weight_json, min_review_count, min_score, manual_intervene, status, effective_from, effective_to, updated_by, updated_at FROM rank_config WHERE id = #{configId} AND region = #{region}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(version), 0) + 1 FROM rank_config WHERE rank_type = #{rankType} AND region = #{region} AND city_id = #{cityId} AND category_id = #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rank_config(rank_type, region, city_id, category_id, version, calc_cycle, weight_json, min_review_count, min_score, manual_intervene, status, updated_by) VALUES(#{rankType}, #{region}, #{cityId}, #{categoryId}, #{version}, #{calcCycle}, #{weightJson}, #{minReviewCount}, #{minScore}, #{manualIntervene}, #{status}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE rank_config SET rank_type = #{rankType}, city_id = #{cityId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, calc_cycle = #{calcCycle}, weight_json = #{weightJson}, min_review_count = #{minReviewCount}, min_score = #{minScore}, manual_intervene = #{manualIntervene}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND region = #{region} AND status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT name FROM city WHERE id = #{cityId} AND region = #{region} AND status = 1 FOR UPDATE
SELECT name FROM category WHERE id = #{categoryId} AND region = #{region} AND status = 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `rank`(name, type, region, city_id, category_id, config_id, period, enabled) VALUES(#{name}, #{type}, #{region}, #{cityId}, #{categoryId}, #{configId}, #{period}, TRUE)
INSERT INTO rank_item(rank_id, shop_id, position, score, reason) VALUES(#{rankId}, #{shopId}, #{position}, #{score}, #{reason})
